items.title:
📼 Some LTX-2 video examples and prompts generated in Draw Things: Click for more👇🏻

1️⃣ A young male programmer wearing a baseball cap sits at his desk in a medium close-up, lit by the cool glow of his monitor in a dim room. His voice comes in immediately with excited energy over soft keyboard clicks as he says, “Life is boring, let’s coding.” Blue screen light reflects in his eyes while he leans toward the computer, then turns slightly to the camera with raised eyebrows and a bright grin. The camera makes a gentle forward push as the steady typing sound continues in the background.
items.description:
📼 Some LTX-2 video examples and prompts generated in Draw Things: Click for more👇🏻

1️⃣ A young male programmer wearing a baseball cap sits at his desk in a medium close-up, lit by the cool glow of his monitor in a dim room. His voice comes in immediately with excited energy over soft keyboard clicks as he says, “Life is boring, let’s coding.” Blue screen light reflects in his eyes while he leans toward the computer, then turns slightly to the camera with raised eyebrows and a bright grin. The camera makes a gentle forward push as the steady typing sound continues in the background.

Video

items.title: R to @drawthingsapp: 5️⃣Medium close-up frontal shot of a young girl centered in frame, captured with a shallow depth of field and a soft cinematic composition. Warm ambient lighting creates gentle highlights on her face and smooth skin tones, with a softly blurred background in pastel colors and subtle bokeh. She raises both hands in front of her chest, slowly forming a heart shape with her fingers, then leans slightly toward the camera while maintaining steady eye contact. Her lips curve into a gentle smile, her eyes slightly narrowed with relaxed eyelids, and her shoulders remain calm and still. The camera performs a slow forward dolly push, transitioning from a medium close-up to a tighter close-up, emphasizing her facial expression and hand gesture. Soft ambient room tone blends with warm, slow-tempo background music, creating a tender atmosphere. She speaks in a soft, affectionate voice, “I love you.”

items.title:
R to @drawthingsapp: 6️⃣ The Last One——Image To Video！

This guy in the sports jersey looks directly into the lens with a confident, steady gaze. He speaks with subtle lip movements, saying "The louder the crowd, the quieter my mind." The camera performs a slow, dramatic zoom toward his face while the background city lights flicker in soft bokeh. Cool blue moonlight and sharp rim lighting define his silhouette against the misty night air.
